title: v0.2.1 Final Fixes — Screenshot Diff, Route Order, Tab Injection, Password Parsing
overview: Fix 4 confirmed bugs: screenshot-diff broken in Bun runtime, domain filter route.continue() blocks user routes, --allowed-domains only injects into active tab, and passwords starting with -- rejected.
scopeChallenge: Screenshot-diff is the hardest — Playwright internals don't resolve in Bun. Verified that a self-contained PNG decoder using zlib.inflateSync produces byte-identical output. Other 3 fixes are 1-5 lines each.

failureModes.risk: PNG decoder doesn't handle interlaced PNGs
failureModes.mitigation: Playwright never produces interlaced PNGs. Throw clear error.
zlib handles streaming internally. 4K fullpage = ~50MB RGBA, fine for Bun.
Available since Playwright 1.23. Our dep is ^1.58.

tasks.title: Create src/png-compare.ts — self-contained PNG decoder + pixel comparator
tasks.description: PNG decoder using zlib.inflateSync. Handles color types 2 (RGB) and 6 (RGBA), all 5 scanline filter types. Exports decodePNG() and compareScreenshots(). No external deps.
acceptanceCriteria: decodePNG correctly decodes Playwright PNG with all 5 filter types
compareScreenshots returns passed:true for identical images
Throws clear error on non-PNG or unsupported color type

tasks.title: Replace screenshot-diff Playwright internals with png-compare.ts
tasks.description: Remove dynamic require of playwright-core/lib internals. Import from src/png-compare.ts instead.
acceptanceCriteria: screenshot-diff works in bun run dev mode
Explicit nonexistent current path throws error

tasks.title: Fix domain filter to use route.fallback() instead of route.continue()
tasks.description: Replace route.continue() with route.fallback() in all domain filter handlers so user routes still fire for allowed URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: User route block handler fires for allowed-domain URLs with --allowed-domains active
User route fulfill returns mocked response for allowed-domain URLs

tasks.title: Inject domain filter initScript into all open tabs
tasks.description: Iterate all tabs and evaluate initScript in each, not just active page.
acceptanceCriteria: After adding --allowed-domains to session with 3 tabs, blocked WebSocket throws in ALL tabs
Error in one tab doesn't prevent injection in others

tasks.title: Accept passwords starting with -- in auth save
tasks.description: Fix positional arg scanner to not skip args starting with -- unless they match known flags.
acceptanceCriteria: browse auth save site url user --secret stores --secret as password
Selector flags still parse correctly alongside the password
